name: claude-limit-meter
description: Status bar button that opens an Anthropic quota panel (5h / 7d) and installs the /kick slash command for chat handoff.

commands.title: Claude Limit Meter: Open Usage Page (claude.ai)
Claude Limit Meter: Show Quota Limits

claudeLimitMeter.usagePageUrl.description: URL opened by the Open Usage Page command.

claudeLimitMeter.statusBarPriority.description: Status bar item priority. Higher value places the item further to the left in the right-aligned status bar cluster.

claudeLimitMeter.textColor.description: Status bar text color. Use a dark high-contrast color for bright status bars.
